steps.gamesGridBody: Like a real casino: click a tile and that game takes the screen. Come back with the All games button.
steps.welcomeBody: A quick walk around the portal — I will show you where everything is and how to start. Close me with Skip and come back anytime via the ? in the top bar.
steps.tokensBody: Your %gt% balance — the portal virtual currency. Earn it by watching, chatting and doing quests; spend it in the casino, the shop and on the wheel.
steps.navBody: All the sections live here: games and casino, the shop, the ranking and community events.
steps.dropBody: When the streamer drops a secret code in chat, you type it in there. The fastest get %gt%!
steps.bellBody: News about rewards, orders and events lands here.
steps.avatarBody: Profile, settings and logout. In the profile you can link Twitch, Kick, YouTube and Discord accounts.
steps.stakeBody: Set how many %gt% you bet per game (min 10). This stake applies to every game below.
steps.slotsBody: The classics: spin the reels or flip the coin. The server draws the result — the animation just shows it.
steps.rouletteBody: American roulette with 0 and 00. Bet on a color (2×) or an exact number (36×).
steps.diceBody: Pick a threshold and direction. Lower odds = higher multiplier — you see everything before you roll.
steps.crashBody: The rocket flies, the multiplier climbs. Set your auto-cashout target before it bursts!
steps.plinkoBody: Drop the ball — the edge buckets pay the most.
steps.minesBody: Choose the number of bombs and reveal tiles. Cash out before you hit one!
steps.leaderboardBody: The biggest wins and best net of the last 30 days. Maybe you are next?
steps.wheelSpinBody: Spin the wheel for %gt% and win rewards set by the streamer. The cost is on the button.
steps.questListBody: Do tasks (chat, watching) and the progress bar fills up. Then hit Claim!
steps.shopGridBody: Spend %gt% on rewards from the streamer. After a purchase the streamer gets notified and delivers it.
steps.dropRedeemBody: Type chat codes here. Rewards are limited — speed matters!
steps.rankingSortBody: Sort by %gt%, XP and other stats. You climb through activity.

onboarding.mySubtitle: Your portal's status and settings. Branding changes apply immediately.
onboarding.myExpired: plan expired — the portal runs on Basic
onboarding.bSuccessBody: Your subscription activates within a minute — the plan and expiry are set automatically.
onboarding.bActivateHint: Want to skip the trial? Activate the subscription right away — pick a billing period:
onboarding.metaDesc: Spin up a community portal for your channel — your brand, tokens and colors in minutes.
onboarding.title: LAUNCH YOUR OWN PORTAL
onboarding.subtitle: A community portal like this one — with your brand, your tokens and your colors. Everything can be changed later in the panel.
onboarding.name: Portal name
onboarding.brandHint: Tokens are your community's currency — viewers earn them for watching and chatting, and spend them in your shop and games.
onboarding.plan_basic: Economy, shop, ranking, events and quests — a solid start.
onboarding.plan_pro: Everything in Basic + casino, wheel, predictions, OBS overlays and subathon.
onboarding.plan_elite: Everything in Pro + AI assistant, webhooks and full custom branding.
onboarding.trialNote: You start with a 14-day trial of the chosen plan. No card needed. After the trial the portal drops to Basic until you activate a subscription.
onboarding.doneBody: Your portal {slug} is ready and its {days}-day trial just started.
onboarding.doneNext: We'll follow up with subdomain setup and channel-connection steps. Everything is editable later in your portal's admin panel.

admin.secDesc_tenants: Manage client portals (white-label): provision new ones, edit branding (name, tokens, color, logo) and plan. Visible to the platform owner only.
admin.tntEmpty: No portals yet — create the first one below.
admin.tntCreateHint: The slug becomes the subdomain (e.g. neo-zone.yourdomain.com). The plan can be changed later.
admin.tntSocialLinksHint: One per line: «platform url». Platforms: discord, twitch, kick, youtube, tiktok, instagram, x. Empty = founder default.
admin.aiProviderError: The AI provider rejected the request (model, limits or key). Check the AI settings in Integrations and the logs.
admin.aiGreeting: Hi! Describe what you want to do (e.g. „I want to add a 500 %gt% shop reward” or „how do I reward Twitch subs?”) and I'll lay out the steps and point you to the right panel sections.
admin.aiPlaceholder: Describe what you want to do…
admin.aiNotConfigured: The assistant needs a configured AI provider (API key).
admin.modeTip_simple: Simple mode — everyday tools only: shop, drops, events, alerts
admin.modeTip_advanced: Advanced mode — the full streamer toolkit
admin.modeTip_dev: Developer mode — everything, including API and webhooks
admin.secDesc_dashboard: Command center: the key numbers, orders waiting for delivery and shortcuts to the most common actions.
admin.secDesc_analytics: Community activity charts: user growth, token circulation, game and shop popularity. Read-only — you can't break anything here.
admin.secDesc_integrations: API keys and overlay tokens for custom integrations (OBS, scripts). Treat them like passwords — anyone holding a token can read your overlay data.
admin.secDesc_webhooks: Send HTTP notifications to external systems (e.g. Discord or your own server) when something happens on the portal. A developer section.
admin.secDesc_users: Grant and revoke tokens, manage user roles and mark subscribers. The season database reset lives here too.
admin.secDesc_merge: Merge two accounts into one — e.g. when someone signed in with Discord and Twitch separately. Moves tokens, history and achievements.
admin.secDesc_moderation: Block users and words in the bot chat. Blocked users earn no tokens and can't buy in the shop.
admin.secDesc_audit: A log of every admin action: who changed what and when. Invaluable when something doesn't add up.
admin.secDesc_twitch: Twitch connection (EventSub): real-time rewards for subs, bits, raids and follows. Authorization is required because Twitch only sends us your channel's events with your consent — that's why it asks for read access to subs and bits.
admin.secDesc_kick: Kick connection: rewards for subs and follows. Authorization grants read-only access to channel events — without it Kick won't tell us about subs.
admin.secDesc_youtube: YouTube Live connection: chat, memberships and Super Chats. Chat read permission is essential so the bot can see messages and award tokens to viewers.
admin.secDesc_bot: Bot and economy settings: tokens per minute watched, sub and bits bonuses, happy hours. The heart of the earning system.
admin.secDesc_chat: Custom chat commands (e.g. !discord) and the stream chat overlay. Commands work across all connected platforms.
admin.secDesc_timers: Automatic chat messages every X minutes (e.g. a Discord reminder). They only run while the stream is live.
admin.secDesc_faq: Questions and answers shown to viewers on the help page. A good home for channel rules and how-tos.
admin.secDesc_welcome: The welcome screen for new portal users — whatever you set here is what they see on their first visit.
admin.secDesc_songs: Viewer song queue. Viewers request tracks for tokens, you control the queue during the stream.
admin.secDesc_widgets: OBS widget library: counters, goals, alerts, the wheel. Copy a link and paste it as a browser source in OBS.
admin.secDesc_alerts: Stream alerts: new subs, raids, shop purchases. Configure looks, sounds and display time.
admin.secDesc_goals: Stream goals (e.g. 100 subs by month's end) with an overlay progress bar. They rally the community around a target.
admin.secDesc_subathon: Subathon mode: a stream timer extended by subs and donations, with full control over the extension rules.
admin.secDesc_shop: Products bought with tokens: rewards, roles, perks. Pending viewer orders are delivered here too.
admin.secDesc_drops: Token drops: codes to redeem on the site and chat drops to grab. Great for activating viewers mid-stream.
admin.secDesc_seasons: Ranking seasons: reset the leaderboard, archive results and reward the best at season's end.
admin.secDesc_wheel: Wheel of fortune: segments, spin cost and prizes. Viewers spin for tokens on the wheel page.
admin.secDesc_donations: Streamlabs connection: automatic token rewards for donations. Authorization only lets us receive donation notifications — we have no access to your money whatsoever.
admin.secDesc_events: Events and raffles: ticket contests, prize draws, holiday events with bonuses.
admin.secDesc_predictions: Predictions: viewers bet tokens on an outcome (e.g. will you win the match) and the pool goes to those who called it.
admin.secDesc_polls: Community polls: ask questions, viewers vote on the portal.
admin.secDesc_achievements: Achievements viewers unlock through activity. You set the conditions and rewards, the portal grants them automatically.
admin.secDesc_schedule: The stream schedule shown on the site. Set your regular slots so the community knows when to drop by.
admin.secDesc_games: The library of games you play on stream — with history and ratings, visible to viewers on the games page.

overlayPreview.previewLabel: Preview (this is how it looks in OBS)

ai.label: AI key (@bot persona + !imagine)
ai.hint: Paste the AI key in the Integrations section

twitch.label: Twitch connected (EventSub)
twitch.hint: Connect the streamer account in the Twitch section

twitchSubs.label: EventSub subscriptions created
twitchSubs.hint: Click Create subscriptions in the Twitch section

moderation.label: Chat moderation enabled
moderation.hint: Enable rules in the Moderation section

overlay.label: OBS overlay token
overlay.hint: Go to Stream Alerts to generate it

schedule.title: Stream schedule ({count, plural, one {# slot} other {# slots}})
schedule.intro: Weekly schedule shown at /schedule. Repeats every week.
schedule.empty: No slots. Add the first one above.

gamesLibrary.title: Games library
gamesLibrary.intro: Aggregated games library on the public /games page. Steam works out of the box (official API).
gamesLibrary.psnNote: PSN: the game requires a valid PSN_NPSSO (expires ~60 days — refresh from ssocookie).

analytics.streamIntro: Broadcast sessions from Twitch EventSub (stream.online/stream.offline). Measures the streamer’s broadcast time, not per-viewer watch time.
analytics.streamEmpty: No sessions — they’ll appear after the first stream. Requires creating the stream.online/offline subscription in the Twitch section (the “Create subscriptions” button).
analytics.heatmapIntro: When chat is most active (day of week × hour, Europe/Warsaw time). Counted from activity on Twitch + Kick + YouTube (1/min/viewer).
analytics.heatmapEmpty: No data — it’ll appear once someone chats during a stream.

webhooksOut.title: Outgoing webhooks
webhooksOut.intro: Send stream events (subs, donations, purchases, wins…) as a POST JSON to any URL — Discord webhook, n8n, Zapier, your own server. An optional secret signs the body (X-GhostEmpire-Signature: sha256=…). A dead endpoint disables itself after a run of errors.
webhooksOut.empty: No webhooks. Add the first one below.

moderation.title: Chat moderation (automod)
moderation.intro: Automatic moderation on Twitch / Kick / YouTube. The bot checks every message and takes an action (delete / timeout / warn). Requires moderator permissions for the bot account on the platform. Restart the bot after changes. Repeat offenders get harsher penalties automatically (escalation: warn → delete → timeout ×2 for each further violation within a 30-min window).
moderation.profanityDesc: Dictionary of banned words. Also detects evasions: leetspeak (b4d→bad) and separators (b.a.d / b a d).
moderation.regexLabel: Regex patterns (one per line, optional — e.g. v-?bucks)
moderation.linkDesc: Blocks links unless the domain is whitelisted. Also detects bare domains (scam.com) and shorteners (bit.ly).
moderation.linkAllowSubs: Subscribers / VIP / mod can post links
moderation.capsDesc: Flags messages where too high a % of letters are uppercase (ignores short ones).
moderation.lengthDesc: Maximum number of characters in a message.
moderation.repeatDesc: The same character or word repeated too many times (emote spam, copypasta).
moderation.zalgoDesc: Glitch-text — excess Unicode combining marks (ḩ̸̢̛e̵l̶l̷o). Doesn't flag Polish letters.

manage_shop.label: Shop editing
manage_shop.desc: Edit the shop, stream schedule and Discord bot.

deliver_orders.label: Order fulfillment
deliver_orders.desc: Mark pending shop orders as fulfilled.

create_drops.label: Creating drop codes
create_drops.desc: Create and manage drop codes (on-stream codes).

ban_users.label: Banning users
ban_users.desc: Ban users — account lock (temporary or permanent).

mark_subs.label: Flagging subscribers
mark_subs.desc: Assign sub / mod / VIP status per platform.

view_audit.label: View audit log
view_audit.desc: Insight into the admin and moderation action log.

userRoles.title: User roles (admin/mod/donator)
userRoles.userLabel: User (username, Discord ID, or account ID)
userRoles.permsNote: Admins have all permissions automatically. Moderators — only the checked ones.

mergeUsers.title: Merge duplicates
mergeUsers.warning: Destructive operation — the second account is completely deleted after its data moves to the primary. The action is atomic (one DB transaction) but irreversible.
mergeUsers.detectHint: Detection: same OAuth provider account ID, email, or Discord ID.
mergeUsers.confirmRequired: Type the exact username of the second account to confirm
mergeUsers.confirmLabel: Confirmation — type the second account’s username: {name}

databaseReset.lastWarning:
FINAL WARNING

This will IRREVERSIBLY delete ALL users and their data (your account too — you'll log in again). Configuration and catalog stay.

Continue?
databaseReset.resetDone: Database reset — deleted {count} users. Signing out…
databaseReset.title: Database reset
databaseReset.backupDesc: Downloads a copy of the configuration, catalog and user balances as a JSON file — no secrets (emails, OAuth tokens, sessions, logs omitted). Make a backup before deleting anything.
databaseReset.dangerDesc1: Deletes all users and their data: accounts and logins, connected platforms, tokens and transactions, achievements, quests, battle pass progress, bets, event entries, notifications and social links. Also clears the alert queue, chat feed and event logs (Twitch / Kick / YouTube). Users log in fresh (with the welcome bonus).
databaseReset.dangerDesc2: Kept: configuration and catalog — shop, event/achievement/quest/drop definitions, battle pass seasons, chat commands / timers / FAQ, schedule, alert settings, integrations (Twitch / Kick / YouTube / Streamlabs) and the audit log. The owner account returns as admin after logging back in.

auditLog.title: Audit log (last {count})
auditLog.empty: No admin actions in the database. Every grant/draw/refund will show up here — who and when.

modViolations.noViolations: No violations in the last 7 days.

twitchEventSub.intro: Automatic %tokenName% rewards for viewers who subscribe, gift subs, or cheer bits on Twitch. Requires a one-time streamer authorization (%owner%) with the scopes: channel:read:subscriptions, bits:read.
twitchEventSub.notConnected: The Twitch streamer hasn’t authorized yet. Click and log in as %owner% to grant %brandShort% the right to read subs and bits.

kickEvents.setupConfirm: Create webhook subscriptions for all Kick events (subs/gifts/follows/live status)?
kickEvents.intro: Auto-tracking of subscriptions, gifted subs, follows and live status on Kick. Requires a one-time streamer authorization with the scopes: channel:read, events:subscribe.
kickEvents.notConnected: The Kick streamer hasn’t authorized yet. Click and log in as %owner% on Kick to grant %brandShort% the right to subscribe to events.

youtubeLive.intro: Detects Super Chats and new members on YouTube live → grants %tokenName% to the donor, records the donation, triggers a stream alert on the OBS overlay.
youtubeLive.noCacheVideo: No cached live video — the next poll will find it
youtubeLive.notConnected: YouTube not authorized. Log in as the %owner% channel owner to grant %brandShort% read-only access to the live chat.
youtubeLive.manualHint: Manual poll for testing. For auto-polling, set up an external cron (below).
youtubeLive.cronIntro: The Vercel Hobby plan only supports daily cron — for per-minute polling use an external service:
youtubeLive.cronStep2: Create a new job with the URL: {url}
youtubeLive.cronStep3: Method: POST, schedule: every 30s (or 1 min if you’re saving quota)
youtubeLive.cronStep4Note: the same one the Discord bot uses
youtubeLive.cronStep5: Save → the status starts polling automatically
youtubeLive.quotaNote: YouTube Data API quota: 10,000 units/day. Polling every 30s for a 3h stream ≈ 1800 units (plenty of headroom). Poll only during live to save quota.

integrations.title: Integrations / API keys
integrations.intro: Paste your optional-feature keys here — they’re saved in the database, so they survive a computer change and you don’t have to hunt for them in files. The database value overrides env. Keys come back masked. Infrastructure secrets (database, OAuth login, NEXTAUTH/BOT_SECRET) intentionally stay in env.
integrations.clickHint: Click an integration to expand its edit fields.
integrations.overwritePh: paste a new key to overwrite
integrations.aiHint: After pasting the key, ask to enable F4 — the @bot persona and !imagine.
integrations.sentryPh: DSN from your project settings in Sentry

streamAlerts.testSent: Test alert sent — check the overlay
streamAlerts.typesHeader: Alert types — ● toggle · click the name to customize ({count} active)
streamAlerts.intro: Alerts shown via an OBS Browser Source — they display live purchases, wins, subs/bits, donations. The overlay polls the server every ~1.2s — an alert appears at most 1.5s after the event.
streamAlerts.prevAlert1Msg: subscribed to the channel — thanks for the support!
streamAlerts.previewHeader: Live preview — this is how the alert looks on the OBS overlay
streamAlerts.previewHint: Change the accent color below — the preview updates instantly.
streamAlerts.regenConfirm: Generate a new token? Old OBS URLs will stop working — you’ll have to paste the new URL into the OBS Browser Source.
streamAlerts.tokenRegenerated: New token generated — paste the new URL into OBS
streamAlerts.urlNote: Paste this URL as a Browser Source in OBS (size 1920×1080, transparent background = ON, refresh on activate = ON).
streamAlerts.noToken: ⚠ No overlay token in the database. Refresh the page — it should auto-generate on the first visit to this section.
streamAlerts.testHint: You’ll see the alert on the overlay within ~1.5s.

widgets.title: Widget library
widgets.intro: All OBS overlays in one place. Paste the URL as a Browser Source in OBS (transparent background = ON, refresh on activate = ON). The token is shared across all — “Generate new” in Stream Alerts invalidates old URLs.
widgets.clickHint: Click a widget to see a preview, copy the URL, and jump to its appearance settings.
widgets.previewHeader: Preview (this is how it looks on stream)

alerts.name: Stream Alerts
alerts.desc: Live alerts: subs, gifts, bits, donations, purchases, events, welcomes.

chat.name: Chat on screen
chat.desc: Chat messages (Twitch / Kick / YouTube), color per platform. Tip: append ?translate=en (or pl, de, …) to the URL to AI-translate foreign messages under each line (needs an AI key in /admin#integrations).

goals.name: Stream Goals
goals.desc: Goal bars (subs / donations / follows) + Hype Train.

codes.name: Code drops
codes.desc: Code rotation (e.g. game keys) — one on screen at a time.

predictions.name: Predictions / bets
predictions.desc: Current open/closed bet: options, % of pot, pot.

polls.name: Polls
polls.desc: Current open poll: options + live results.

last-sub.name: Last sub
last-sub.desc: Latest subscriber (Twitch sub / gift). Small badge.

last-donator.name: Last donator
last-donator.desc: Latest donation — name + amount. Small badge.

last-follower.name: Last follower
last-follower.desc: Latest follower. Requires Twitch re-auth (followers scope) + subscription.

viewers.name: Viewer count
viewers.desc: Current viewer count on Twitch (when live). Requires a connected Twitch.

emoji-combo.name: Emoji combo
emoji-combo.desc: When viewers spam the same emoji — it pops ×N COMBO. Requires a bot restart.

wheel.name: Wheel of Fortune
wheel.desc: Wheel spin animation + winner on every viewer spin.

rumble.name: Rumble status
rumble.desc: LIVE + viewers on Rumble, or follower/sub count. Requires RUMBLE_API_URL.

companion.name: Champion Companion
companion.desc: Shows the community's most-fed pet on stream — feed yours to claim the spotlight.

clan.name: Champion Clan
clan.desc: Shows the richest clan by treasury on stream — pour GT in to put yours in the spotlight.

clan-war.name: Live Clan War
clan-war.desc: Shows the live clan war on stream — top clans by war points, prize pool and a countdown. Hidden when no war is running.

support-qr.name: Support QR carousel
support-qr.desc: Rotates a scannable QR for each of your support/tip methods (from /admin#payments) — one on screen at a time, every ~10s. Drop one source in for the whole stream.

support-goal.name: Support goal bar
support-goal.desc: A live fundraising progress bar for your support goal (from /admin#payments) — it fills as you bump the collected amount, and turns green when you hit the target. The donation-goal widget for your stream.

top-supporters.name: Top supporters board
top-supporters.desc: An on-stream credits board of your all-time biggest tippers (from real donation webhooks), ranked with medals. A live thank-you leaderboard; hidden until you have a supporter.

sponsors.name: Sponsors carousel
sponsors.desc: Rotates your sponsors/partners (from /admin#sponsors) one at a time — for contractual on-stream logo display. Drop one source in for the whole stream; hidden until you add a sponsor.

trivia.name: Live Trivia
trivia.desc: Shows the trivia question you put live (from /admin#trivia) with answer bars + a countdown, revealing the correct answer when time's up. Hidden when no round is live.

widgets.prevPollQ: What do we play on Friday?
widgets.genIntro: Create your own text overlays (e.g. social handle, “now playing…”, an announcement). Supports emoji and Unicode. Each widget has its own OBS URL — edits update on the overlay live (~8 s).
widgets.builderHintFree: Free position active — drag the widget to move, the white corner to resize.
widgets.builderHintSlot: Click or drag on the screen to set a free position, or use the slot dropdown.
widgets.emptyList: No custom widgets — create the first one above.

customAlerts.title: Custom alerts
customAlerts.intro: Create custom alerts (name / title / message / icon / optional color and number) and trigger them manually on the OBS overlay — e.g. raid, announcement, milestone.
customAlerts.empty: No custom alerts — create the first one above.

streamGoals.title: Stream Goals + Hype Train
streamGoals.intro: Goals shown on the OBS overlay. Auto-incremented by Twitch EventSub (subs/gifts/cheers), Streamlabs (PLN donations), YouTube super chats + members.
streamGoals.obsNote: Goal bars appear in the bottom-left corner; hype train (when active) at the top.
streamGoals.hypeSetupNote: — Twitch EventSub must have the channel.hype_train.* subscription (added on the next “Setup” in the Twitch section).
streamGoals.empty: No goals. Add the first one below.

subathon.intro: Countdown automatically extended by subs/gifts (Twitch + Kick) and donations (Streamlabs + YouTube).
subathon.obsNote: The countdown appears at the top of the screen when the subathon is active. Token shared with alerts/goals.

botConfig.happyDesc: During the chosen hours (Polish time) all %gt% rewards from chat and Discord are multiplied. Applied portal-side — the bot needs no changes.
botConfig.saved: Bot config updated. The bot will apply it on its next fetch (~60s).
botConfig.title: Discord bot — reward config
botConfig.intro: The bot fetches these values from the API every ~60s. Changes apply automatically without restarting the bot.
botConfig.enabledLabel: Bot ENABLED — when off, the bot grants no tokens

chatCommands.fieldsRequired: Enter a trigger and a response
chatCommands.title: Chat commands
chatCommands.intro: Work on Twitch + Kick + YouTube. The bot fetches enabled commands every ~2 min. The trigger is the first word of a message, e.g. !portal.
chatCommands.empty: No commands. Add the first one below.
chatCommands.liveTitle: Works only when the stream is live
chatCommands.activeFromTitle: Active only {min} min after stream start
chatCommands.activeFromInputTitle: The command starts working only N minutes after stream start (0 = immediately). Implies “live”.

chatOverlay.title: Chat overlay (OBS) — appearance
chatOverlay.intro: Chat from Twitch / Kick / YouTube in one window. Customize the message appearance — changes go to the overlay and the live preview below.
chatOverlay.obsNote: Messages appear from the bottom of the screen; bar color by platform. The preview reacts to the settings above.

chatTimers.title: Timers (cyclic messages)
chatTimers.intro: The bot posts these messages every X minutes on Twitch + Kick + YouTube — only when chat is active (i.e. during a stream).
chatTimers.empty: No timers. Add the first one below.
chatTimers.messagePh: Message (e.g. Hop on the portal for %gt%!)

faq.fieldsRequired: Enter a keyword and a response
faq.title: FAQ / auto-responses
faq.intro: The bot replies when a message contains a keyword (not just !commands). Works on Twitch + Kick + YouTube. “Whole word” = matches only as a standalone word.
faq.empty: No FAQ entries. Add the first one below.

welcome.title: Welcome messages
welcome.intro: The bot greets a viewer's first message in a given stream, on Twitch + Kick + YouTube. Use {user} as the viewer's name.
welcome.bonusTitle: %gt% granted once per viewer per session on greeting (0 = disabled)

songQueue.title: Song requests (queue)
songQueue.intro: Viewers add tracks with the {cmd} command on any platform. Here you play / skip / clear the queue (refreshes every 10 s).

shop.title: Shop ({count, plural, one {# item} other {# items}})

seasons.title: Battle Pass / Seasons
seasons.intro: Seasons roll over monthly (auto on the first XP event of the month). Viewers collect XP for activity and claim rewards at tiers. Viewer page: /seasons.
seasons.ensureHint: Creates a season for the current month with default rewards.
seasons.rewardHelp: tokens: amount of %gt% in “value” · code: code shown to the player after claiming · item: physical reward, claimed via ticket (put the details in “value”) · the rest = cosmetic.

streamlabs.title: Streamlabs — donations
streamlabs.notConnectedDesc: Streamlabs not connected yet. After authorization, donations will be automatically matched to users.
streamlabs.unmatchedHint: Enter a username or Discord ID and click Assign
streamlabs.noUnmatched: No unmatched donations 🎉 (auto-match works or there are no donations yet)

events.templatesIntro: Launch a ready-made seasonal event with one click — it creates an active event starting now (happy hour = bonus %gt% multiplier, giveaway = prize draw). Edit the details / end it below in “active events”.

womens_day.label: Women’s Day
womens_day.name: 💃 Women’s Day — x2 %gt%!
womens_day.description: To celebrate Women’s Day, all %tokenName% are doubled!

valentines.label: Valentine’s Day
valentines.name: ❤️ Valentine’s Day — x2 %gt%!
valentines.description: Fall in love with farming tokens — double today!

easter.label: Easter
easter.name: 🐰 Easter egg
easter.description: Holiday giveaway — we draw winners from active viewers!

halloween.label: Halloween
halloween.name: 🎃 Halloween — x3 %gt%!
halloween.description: Spooky night — triple tokens for everyone!

christmas.label: Christmas
christmas.name: 🎄 Christmas giveaway
christmas.description: A prize awaits under the tree — join the event!

nye.label: New Year’s Eve
nye.name: 🎆 New Year’s Eve — x2.5 %gt%!
nye.description: Welcome the New Year with a token bonus!

events.title: Events
events.drawConfirm: Draw winners for “{name}”? This action cannot be undone.

predictions.title: Predictions / Bets
predictions.intro: Create questions, viewers bet %tokenName%. Pot = sum of all stakes. After resolution, the winning option splits the pot proportionally to stakes. No winners → everyone refunded.
predictions.obsNote: Shows the current open/closed bet at the top of the OBS screen. Token shared with alerts/goals. You can show the bet on the /predictions page and/or this overlay — whichever you like.
predictions.qMin: Question must be at least 5 characters
predictions.resolveConfirm:
Resolve: winning option “{opt}”?

The {pot} %gt% pot will be split among winners proportionally to stakes.
predictions.paidOut: Paid out: {winners} winners, {pot} %gt% from the pot
predictions.cancelConfirm: Cancel the bet and refund everyone’s stakes?
predictions.deleteConfirm: Delete this bet from the database?
predictions.emptyList: No bets. Add the first one below.
predictions.announceTitleOn: Bot announces this bet in chat — click to disable
predictions.announceTitleOff: Bot doesn’t announce — click to enable
predictions.questionPh: e.g. How many deaths this stream?
predictions.announceCheckTitle: The bot will periodically remind about this bet in chat while it’s open

polls.title: Polls / votes
polls.intro: Simple community polls (no tokens). Visible at /polls; logged-in users vote and can change their vote while the poll is open. Closed = results only.
polls.obsNote: Shows the current open poll at the top of the OBS screen. Token shared with alerts/goals. Show the poll on /polls and/or this overlay.
polls.previewQuestion: What do we play on Friday?
polls.optMin: Provide at least 2 options (one per line)
polls.questionPh: e.g. What do we play on Friday?

achievements.title: Achievements (custom + granting)
achievements.intro: Create your own achievements. Auto types (level / subs / donations etc.) are granted automatically once the threshold is crossed; the manual type you grant by hand below. The reward is XP / tokens and/or a physical reward (code/item) shown to the player in a notification.
achievements.grantHeading: Grant an achievement to a user
achievements.empty: No achievements — create the first one above.
achievements.deleteConfirm: Delete “{name}”? It will also disappear for everyone who earned it.
achievements.rewardNoteLabel: Physical reward (code/item — shown to the player, optional)
achievements.rewardNotePh: e.g. Steam key: XXXX-YYYY / VIP role on Discord

wheel.title: Wheel of Fortune
wheel.intro: Viewers spend %gt% to spin the wheel and win rewards. Viewer page: /wheel. Every spin also animates on the OBS overlay below.
wheel.obsNote: Add as a Browser Source in OBS. The wheel animates on every viewer spin.

codeDrops.title: Code drops (overlay)
codeDrops.intro: A pool of codes (e.g. game keys). The overlay picks and shows one code on screen, rotating it on a set interval. Every code appears before any repeats.
codeDrops.bulkLabel: Add codes (one per line; optionally: Label | CODE)
codeDrops.emptyList: No codes — add a pool above.

grantTokens.title: Grant tokens
grantTokens.lblUser: User (username, Discord ID or account ID)

push.title: Notifications
push.intro: Broadcast a web push to viewers who enabled notifications on your portal.
push.setupHint: Web push isn't configured yet. Set the VAPID keys (npx web-push generate-vapid-keys → Vercel env VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY / VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY, see docs/ENV.md), then this panel goes live.
push.bodyPh: Message — e.g. Special stream tonight at 8pm!

sponsors.title: Sponsors / partners
sponsors.intro: Brand partners shown as a strip on your public
sponsors.empty: No sponsors yet. Add your first partner below.

scenes.title: Overlay scene builder
scenes.intro: Compose several overlay widgets on one 16:9 canvas, then drop a SINGLE browser source into OBS for the whole scene. Drag to move, drag the corner to resize.
scenes.empty: No scene selected. Create one above.
scenes.canvasEmpty: Add widgets below — they'll appear here to position.

collectibles.title: Collectible cards
collectibles.intro: Cards viewers collect by opening GT packs on
collectibles.empty: No cards yet. Add your first card below.

economyHealth.title: GT economy health
economyHealth.intro: Circulating supply plus the last 30 days of GT minted (faucets) vs burned (sinks). If faucets keep outpacing sinks, GT slowly inflate and lose value.
economyHealth.hint_inflating: Viewers earn far more than they spend. Consider richer shop/casino sinks or trimming faucet rewards.
economyHealth.hint_healthy: Mint and burn are roughly balanced — GT hold their value.
economyHealth.hint_contracting: Sinks outpace faucets; the supply is shrinking. Fine short-term, just watch it doesn't dry up rewards.

community.title: Community
community.intro: Your social features at a glance — top Ghost Companions (by fed GT) and top clans (by treasury). Both sink GT, balancing the faucets.

trivia.title: Trivia / Quiz
trivia.intro: A question bank viewers answer at /trivia for %gt% (one attempt per question).
trivia.empty: No questions yet — add your first below.

clanWars.title: Clan wars
clanWars.intro: Run a time-boxed war: clans earn war points equal to the GT members contribute during the window. The top clan wins the prize pool into its treasury.
clanWars.endConfirm: End the war now and award the prize pool to the leading clan?
clanWars.endedNoWinner: War ended — no clan scored, no prize awarded.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.intro: Protect your admin account with a time-based code (TOTP). Once enabled it can be required for sensitive actions. Use Google Authenticator, Authy or any compatible app.
twoFactor.setupTitle: Add this key to your authenticator app
twoFactor.setupHint: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app — or add an account manually with the key below — then type the 6-digit code it shows.
twoFactor.confirmHint: Enter the 6-digit code from your app to confirm
twoFactor.disableHint: Enter a current 6-digit code to turn 2FA off.

clipDirector.title: AI Clip Director
clipDirector.intro: Detects a chat hype spike during your stream and auto-creates a Twitch clip of the moment. Needs your Twitch connection with the clips:edit scope.
clipDirector.needConnect: Connect your Twitch channel (Platforms → Twitch) to enable clip creation.
clipDirector.needScope: Your Twitch token is missing the clips:edit scope — reconnect Twitch and grant clip permission to enable auto-clips.
clipDirector.noClip: Couldn't create a clip — check the clips:edit scope and that you're live.
clipDirector.noClips: No clips yet — they appear here when hype fires (or you test).

recap.title: AI Stream Recap
recap.intro: After a stream, AI writes a recap (duration, top events, top chatters/supporters, %gt% earned) and can post it to your community Discord. Needs an AI provider (elite plan) + a Discord webhook.
recap.webhookSetPh: Webhook set — paste a new one to replace, or clear to remove
recap.aiUnavailable: AI isn't configured (set a provider + key in Integrations, elite plan).
recap.aiFailed: The AI call failed — check the provider/model.

paymentMethods.title: Support / payment methods
paymentMethods.intro: Real-money ways viewers can support you, shown on your public page:
paymentMethods.empty: No payment methods yet — add your first below.
paymentMethods.phNote: Optional note shown under the method

soundRewards.title: Stream sound rewards
soundRewards.intro: A catalog of sounds viewers buy with %gt% to play on your alerts overlay. Each = name + emoji + cost + a sound URL.

admin.modAs: You're viewing the panel as a moderator.
admin.modHidden: Sections without the matching permission are hidden.
admin.dashShortcutsHint: Common actions — use the tabs on the left to reach the full tools.

profile.help: Your profile: link accounts (Twitch, Kick, YouTube, Discord), set your nickname and see your stats. Linked accounts count your stream activity towards quests and the ranking.
profile.xpTotalMax: {xp} XP total · max level reached — XP now builds prestige ✦
profile.xpTotal: {xp} XP total · {left} XP to max LVL 100
profile.pendingSubtitle: {count, plural, one {# purchase} other {# purchases}} awaiting delivery
profile.refIntro: Share your link — when a friend signs up and enters your code, you BOTH get {n} {sym}.
profile.refAlreadyClaimed: You've already used a friend's code — but yours still works for everyone you invite.
profile.refClaimed: +{n} GT — thanks for joining via a friend!
profile.socialIntro: Public links on your profile. Click a platform to expand and edit.
profile.socialClicksTitle: Link opens from your public profile (directional)
profile.discordIntro: Without linking, the %brandShort% bot CAN'T grant you tokens for Discord activity (messages + voice). Generate a code and enter it with the /link kod:XXXXXX command on Ghost's Discord server.
profile.discordExpiry: The code expires in 10 minutes. Refresh this page after using it.
profile.accountsBlockIntro: Link platforms to this account — tokens, subs and achievements all count in one place (instead of a separate account per platform).
profile.unlinkOnlyMethodTitle: This is your only login method — link another first
profile.onlyMethodNote: You have one login method — unlinking it would lock you out. Link a second platform to enable unlinking.
profile.errTargetMissing: Source account doesn't exist — try again.
profile.errAlreadyUsed: This platform account is already linked to another %brandShort% account.
profile.errAlreadyHave: You already have this platform linked.

assistant.title: Help assistant
assistant.intro: Need a hand? Jump to a page or ask a question.
assistant.loginToAsk: Sign in to ask the AI assistant
assistant.aiUnavailable: The AI assistant isn't available right now — the quick links and FAQ above have you covered.
assistant.rateLimited: Too many questions at once — give it a moment.

earn.a: Watch and chat while the stream is live, claim your daily bonus on the home page, and finish daily quests. The exact amounts depend on the streamer's settings.

link.q: How do I link my account?
link.a: Open your profile and connect Twitch, Kick, YouTube or Discord. Connections are read-only — the portal never touches anyone's money.

clans.a: Teams you join or found on the Clans page. Contribute %tokenName% to your clan vault and compete in clan wars for prize pools.

casino.a: Bet %tokenName% on mini-games like slots, blackjack and roulette. Only bet what you can spare — it's just for fun.

portal.q: Can I launch my own portal?
portal.a: Yes — open the account menu or the About page and pick "Launch your own portal" to start your own white-label community.

portals.title: My portals
portals.subtitle: Switch between your favorite streamers' portals from one place.
portals.emptyFollows: You don't follow any other portals yet.
portals.emptyFollowsHint: Visit a streamer's portal and tap Follow — it'll show up here so you can switch anytime.
portals.loginPrompt: Sign in to follow streamer portals and switch between them.
portals.notReady: The hub isn't ready yet — try again shortly.
portals.rateLimited: Too fast — give it a moment.

support.metaDesc: Support {name} — payment methods, crypto and bank, with one-tap copy and QR codes.
support.title: Support {name}
support.subtitle: Thanks for keeping {brand} alive 💜
support.empty: No support methods are set up yet — check back soon.
support.pageQrTitle: QR code for this page (great for OBS / posters)
support.disclaimer: Payments go directly to the streamer via the method you choose — this page only shows the details.

shipping.title: Shipping address (physical rewards)
shipping.privacyNote: Used only to send you physical prizes. Stored encrypted, visible only to you and the operator at fulfillment, and deletable anytime.
shipping.consent: I agree to store my shipping/contact details for delivering physical rewards.
shipping.consentRequired: Please tick the consent box to save.

dataExport.title: Your data (GDPR)
dataExport.subtitle: Download everything we store about your account as a JSON file.
dataExport.err: Couldn't generate the export. Please try again.

donationCode.title: Your donation code
donationCode.desc: Put this code in your tip message on the support page — your donation then credits %gt% to your account (codeless tips are matched by an admin).

push.title: Push notifications
push.desc: Get notified when the stream goes live and for key moments — even with the tab closed.
push.denied: Notifications are blocked in your browser settings.
push.testBody: This is a test notification — it works! 🎉

collectibles.metaDesc: Open GT packs and collect cards.
collectibles.title: Collectibles
collectibles.subtitle: Open packs with %gt% and complete your collection.
collectibles.empty: No cards in this portal yet — check back soon.
collectibles.err_no-cards: No cards in this portal yet.

market.metaDesc: Buy and sell collectible cards for %gt%.
market.title: Card market
market.empty: No listings right now — check back, or list one of your cards.
market.signIn: Sign in to buy and sell cards.
market.noCards: You have no cards to sell yet — open packs on /collectibles first.
market.err_unavailable: That listing is no longer available.
market.err_too-many: Too many active listings — cancel one first.

search.title: Smart search
search.subtitle: Describe what you're looking for — results are ranked by meaning, not just keywords.
search.placeholder: e.g. how do I support the streamer?
search.dormant: Smart search isn't switched on for this portal yet (it needs an AI key in /admin#integrations). Try the Ctrl/⌘ K quick-nav meanwhile.

passkey.title: Passkeys
passkey.desc: Add a passkey (fingerprint, face or device PIN) for fast, passwordless sign-in.
passkey.errAdd: Couldn't add the passkey. Please try again.

trivia.title: Quiz
trivia.subtitle: Answer correctly to earn %gt%. One attempt per question.
trivia.empty: No quiz questions right now — check back soon.
trivia.wrong: Not quite — better luck on the next one!
trivia.loginToPlay: Sign in to play and earn.

viewerPreview.banner: You're viewing the portal as a regular viewer.

home.gsStep_platform: Link a platform (Twitch, Kick, YouTube, Discord)
home.gsStep_clip: Vote for Clip of the Week
home.metaDesc: The official %brandName% community hub. Earn %tokenName%, redeem rewards and climb the ranking.
home.noEventsMsg: More coming soon — giveaways, raffles and happy hours return regularly.
home.heroSubtitle: Collect %tokenName%, redeem them for real rewards, climb the ranking. The official community portal of streamer %owner%.

shop.help: Spend %tokenName% on rewards from the streamer (roles, perks, surprises). After a purchase the streamer gets notified and delivers the order.
shop.metaDesc: Spend %tokenName% on Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted subs and more.
shop.title: SHOP
shop.subtitle: Exchange %tokenName% for keys, skins, subs and rewards you won't find anywhere else.
shop.emptyMsg: Nothing here yet — check another category or come back later. The catalog grows with the empire.

authError.title: SIGN-IN ERROR
authError.errConfiguration: This sign-in method is temporarily unavailable. Please sign in with another platform (e.g. Google or Discord) or try again later.
authError.errAccessDenied: Access denied. Your account may be banned — contact an administrator on Discord.
authError.errVerification: The verification link has expired or is invalid.
authError.errEmailCreateAccount: Could not create the email account.
authError.errOAuthAccountNotLinked: An account with this email is already linked to another provider.
authError.errDefault: Something went wrong during sign-in. Please try again or use another platform.

polls.help: Community polls — vote on what happens next (e.g. what the streamer plays). Results update live and your vote counts right away.
polls.title: POLLS
polls.subtitle: Vote in community decisions. You can change your vote while the poll is open.
polls.emptyMsg: There are no polls right now. Check back later!

welcome.metaDesc: One token economy for Twitch, Kick, YouTube and Discord. Collect %tokenName%, redeem them for rewards.
welcome.sub2: Earn %tokenName% for activity, redeem them for real rewards, compete and win events.
welcome.hlTokensDesc: Earn %gt% for chat, voice, subs, donations and quests — on every platform.
welcome.hlRewardsDesc: Redeem tokens in the shop: Steam keys, skins, gifted subs, voice with Ghost.
welcome.hlCompeteDesc: Rankings, events, predictions, battle pass and seasonal rewards.
welcome.hlBotDesc: Twitch + Kick + YouTube: commands, timers, greetings, song requests, overlay.

signin.title: SIGN IN
signin.subtitle: Choose a platform to access your profile, shop and ranking.
signin.passkeyDesc: Use your fingerprint, face or device PIN
signin.errPasskeyFailed: Passkey sign-in failed. Make sure you've added a passkey in your profile, or use a platform above.
signin.descTwitch: Link your Twitch account — subscription tracking
signin.errOAuthSignin: Couldn't start sign-in with the provider — usually a missing / wrong key in env (e.g. TWITCH_CLIENT_ID/SECRET in Vercel).
signin.errOAuthCallback: Error returning from the provider — check the Redirect URI in the developer console (must be /api/auth/callback/<provider>).
signin.errOAuthCreateAccount: Couldn't create an account from this provider.
signin.errOAuthAccountNotLinked: This email is already linked to another platform — sign in with the one you used first.
signin.errAccessDenied: Access denied (account banned or consent withheld).
signin.errConfiguration: Sign-in configuration error on the server side.
signin.redirectHint: Paste EXACTLY this Redirect URI in the developer console (Twitch / Kick / Discord / Google):
signin.footerAccept: By signing in you accept the <terms>Terms</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

predictions.help: Bet %tokenName% on an outcome. The pool is split among correct picks in proportion to their stakes — the bolder the call, the bigger the win.
predictions.metaDesc: Bet %tokenName% on stream events — winners split the pool.
predictions.subtitle: Bet on stream events with %tokenName%. The winning option splits the entire pot (including losers' stakes) proportionally to the %gt% wagered.
predictions.emptyMsg: The streamer will add a new bet when it gets hyped 🎲
predictions.alreadyWagered: You wagered {gt} %gt% on option #{n}. Wait for the resolution.

drops.title: DROP CODES
drops.subtitle: Enter the secret code Ghost dropped in chat. The first N people get a bonus.
drops.historyEmpty: You haven’t claimed any drops yet. Be first during the next live stream.
drops.how1: During the live stream Ghost drops a secret code in chat (e.g. GHOST24).
drops.how2: Type it here. The first N people get a bonus reward (sometimes ×4 the standard reward).
drops.how3: Each code can be claimed only once. Trying to claim again = 409.
drops.how4: Codes expire (usually after 60 minutes). Too late = gone.
drops.how5: Drops also count toward the “Claim a drop code” daily quest.
drops.help: The streamer drops secret codes in chat. Type the code here before others do — rewards are limited and the fastest get %tokenName%.
drops.metaDesc: Enter secret codes from the live stream to grab %tokenName% — first to claim gets a bonus.
drops.loginPrompt: Sign in to enter drop codes during the stream.
drops.hint: Enter the code Ghost drops in chat during the stream. First to grab it gets a bonus!
drops.footer: Each code = 1× claim. Bonus for the first N people.
drops.bonusGone: Bonuses have already been claimed by others 🐢

seasons.help: The season Battle Pass: earn XP, level up and claim rewards along the track. A season runs for a limited time — the bar shows your progress.
seasons.metaDesc: Earn seasonal XP through activity and unlock rewards across tiers.
seasons.daysLeft: {days, plural, one {# day} other {# days}} left
seasons.loginPrompt: Sign in to earn seasonal XP and claim rewards.
seasons.earnHint: 💡 Earn XP for activity: chat, voice, subs, donations, bits, drops, events, purchases.
seasons.noRewards: This season's rewards haven't been configured yet.

schedule.footnote: The schedule may change — check Discord for the latest info

quests.help: Quests are tasks (chat, watching, activity) that pay %tokenName% and XP. When the bar hits 100%, hit Claim — the reward lands on your balance instantly.
quests.metaDesc: Daily tasks in %brandShort% — complete them and claim your rewards.
quests.title: DAILY QUESTS
quests.subtitle: 3 tasks every day. Complete them, claim, grab %tokenName%.
quests.allDoneMsg: You earned {total} %gt% total from daily quests. Reset at 00:00.
quests.emptyMsg: Quests refresh daily — come back tomorrow for a new batch of %tokenName%.
quests.how1: The Discord bot tracks your activity (messages, voice) and updates progress automatically.
quests.how2: Enter drop codes during the live stream (Ghost drops a code in chat → be first to type it).
quests.how3: When progress hits the target, click CLAIM — tokens land in your account.
quests.how4: Everything resets at 00:00. Unclaimed quests from yesterday disappear (claim the day they're generated!).

kasyno.helpScratch: Buy a ticket and scratch 9 fields: three matching prize symbols win that multiplier — from 1× (🍀) to 100× (🃏). Scratch one by one or reveal everything with one click.
kasyno.helpHilo: You see a card and guess whether the next one is higher or lower (Ace low, King high; a tie loses). Every correct guess multiplies the pot — cash out before you miss!
kasyno.helpBlackjack: Classic blackjack vs the dealer: draw to 21, the dealer draws to 17. A win pays 2×, a natural blackjack 2.5×, a push returns the stake. Double: ×2 stake and one card.
kasyno.jackpotHint: 1% of every bet feeds the pool. Hit 7️⃣7️⃣7️⃣ on slots to win it all!
kasyno.animForced: Animations forced on — click to follow your system setting
kasyno.animSystem: Your system reduces motion — click to force animations on
kasyno.noHistory: Play your first game and your history will show up here.
kasyno.help: The %gt% Casino runs on %tokenName% — the portal virtual currency (not real money). Set your stake and pick a game: the server draws the result, the animation just shows it. Winnings land on your balance instantly.
kasyno.helpPickGame: Pick a game below to see how it works.
kasyno.helpSlots: 3 reels: three matching symbols win that symbol multiplier — from 10× for cherries up to 800× for the seven.
kasyno.helpCoinflip: Coin flip: the ghost doubles your stake (2×), the skull takes it.
kasyno.helpRoulette: American roulette (0 and 00): red/black pays 2×, an exact number 36×.
kasyno.helpDice: Pick a threshold and direction (under/over). Lower odds = higher multiplier — you see both before you roll.
kasyno.helpCrash: The multiplier climbs until the rocket bursts at a random moment. Set your auto-cashout target: if the rocket reaches it, you win stake × target.
kasyno.helpPlinko: The ball drops through pegs into a multiplier bucket. The middle pays little, the edge buckets pay the most.
kasyno.helpMines: A 5×5 board: choose the number of bombs and reveal tiles. Every safe tile raises the multiplier — cash out before you hit a bomb.
kasyno.title: 🎰 %gt% Casino
kasyno.subtitlePre: Slots, coinflip and roulette for %tokenName%. In chat too:

companion.title: Ghost Companion
companion.subtitle: Feed your spectral companion Ghost Tokens and watch it evolve.
companion.guestText: Log in to hatch a companion that grows the more you support the stream.
companion.sinkNote: Feeding burns GT — a healthy sink for the economy.

clans.title: Clans
clans.subtitle: Band together, pool GT into your clan's treasury and climb the leaderboard.

clans.createHint: The cost seeds your clan's treasury.
clans.leaveConfirm: Leave the clan? If you're the owner, the clan will be disbanded.
clans.sinkNote: Contributions burn GT into the treasury — a healthy economy sink.
clans.lbEmpty: No clans yet — found the first one!

clans.warNoPoints: No clan has scored yet — be the first to contribute!
clans.warHint: Your contributions count toward both the treasury and your clan's war points.

clips.title: Clip of the Week

clips.emptyHint: Clip a great moment on Twitch — it shows up here for the community to vote on.
clips.loginToVote: Sign in to vote for your favourite.

sounds.subtitle: Spend %gt% to play a sound live on the stream. Preview it before you buy.

sounds.empty: No sounds available yet — the streamer hasn't added any.

wheel.title: 🎡 Wheel of Fortune
wheel.subtitle: Spin and win %tokenName%.
wheel.disabled: The Wheel of Fortune is currently disabled. Check back later!

games.metaDesc: Games I play — an aggregated library (Steam and more).
games.title: 🎮 Game library
games.empty: The library is empty for now — check back later.

terms.metaDesc: Terms of use for the %brandShort% portal.
terms.title: TERMS
terms.s1i1: These terms set out the rules for using the %brandShort% portal (hereinafter: Portal) available at ghost-empire-web.vercel.app.
terms.s1i2: The Portal operator is %owner% — a streamer active on Twitch, Kick and Discord.
terms.s1i3: Using the Portal requires creating an account via OAuth (Twitch or Discord) and accepting these terms and the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.
terms.s2i1: An account is created automatically on your first OAuth sign-in.
terms.s2i2: Every user receives 500 %tokenName% (%gt%) as a welcome bonus.
terms.s2i3: A user can link multiple platforms (Twitch + Discord) to a single account.
terms.s2i4: Account data (avatar, nickname) is synced with the OAuth provider on every sign-in.
terms.s2i5: The user agrees not to create multiple accounts to bypass limits or abuse the economy.
terms.s3i1: %tokenName% are the Portal's internal virtual currency — they have NO monetary value and cannot be exchanged for money or resold.
terms.s3i2: %gt% are earned through activity: Discord messages, voice time, drop codes on live, daily quests, events.
terms.s3i3: %gt% can only be spent in the Portal shop on rewards (Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted subs, cosmetics).
terms.s3i4: The Operator reserves the right to change prices, availability and the reward list without prior notice.
terms.s3i5: %gt% are forfeited when an account is deleted and are non-refundable.
terms.s3i6: Attempts to obtain %gt% dishonestly (bots, multi-accounts, exploits) result in loss of tokens + a ban.
terms.s4i1: Shop purchases are final — %gt% are deducted immediately.
terms.s4i2: Physical rewards and game keys are delivered manually — contact via a Discord ticket. Delivery time: up to 7 days.
terms.s4i3: Some rewards have requirements: minimum level, sub tier (T1/T2/T3/OG/DUAL), subscription tenure in months.
terms.s4i4: If a reward cannot be delivered (out of stock, error) — the Operator refunds the %gt%.
terms.s4i5: Rewards are non-refundable after delivery (Steam keys are irreversible).
terms.s4i6: Physical rewards require you to provide shipping details (name, address, phone, optionally a parcel locker) when you claim them — given with your consent and stored encrypted. Delivery is by post or parcel locker (up to 14 days); after fulfillment the shipping data is deleted. You can review or delete it anytime on your profile.
terms.s5i1: Events (giveaway, raffle, contest, happy_hour) are run by the Operator.
terms.s5i2: Winners are drawn with a cryptographically-secure algorithm (node:crypto.randomInt). The algorithm is fair and open (the code is on GitHub).
terms.s5i3: Raffles: 1 ticket = 1 chance. Each ticket is a separate entry — buying more increases your odds proportionally.
terms.s5i4: A giveaway/raffle win cannot be exchanged for %gt% or other rewards.
terms.s5i5: Some events have requirements (e.g. “active subscriber”) — checked at draw time.
terms.s6b2: Using bots, scripts or autoclickers to earn tokens
terms.s6b4: Attempting technical exploits (SQL injection, XSS, brute-forcing drop codes)
terms.s6b5: Offensive or illegal content in bio, username or social links
terms.s6b6: Exploiting economy bugs (e.g. negative prices) instead of reporting them
terms.s6b7: Selling / trading / lending the account to others
terms.s7i1: A violation of the terms results in (at the Operator's discretion): a warning, loss of %gt%, a temporary ban (1-30 days), a permanent ban.
terms.s7i2: Permanent ban = loss of all %gt% and unfulfilled rewards.
terms.s7i3: A ban is the Operator's decision and is not subject to appeal, unless there is an obvious misunderstanding.
terms.s7i4: A banned user may reach out via Discord for clarification.
terms.s8i1: The Portal is provided “as is” — the Operator does not guarantee 100% uptime or freedom from bugs.
terms.s8i2: The Operator is NOT liable for outages, loss of %gt% due to technical errors, DDoS attacks or hosting problems.
terms.s8i3: In case of a system failure the Operator will make efforts to restore the pre-incident state but does not guarantee full compensation.
terms.s8i4: The Portal may be shut down entirely at any time — in which case the Operator gives 30 days' notice.
terms.s9i1: The Operator reserves the right to change these terms.
terms.s9i2: Major changes are announced on Discord 7 days in advance.
terms.s9i3: Using the Portal after changes take effect means accepting them. If you disagree — delete your account.
terms.s10i1: These terms are governed by Polish law.
terms.s10i2: Matters not covered are subject to the Polish Civil Code and GDPR.
terms.s10i3: Disputes are resolved by the court competent for the Operator's place of residence, unless the Consumer chooses otherwise.

privacy.title: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.s1p: The controller of your personal data on the %brandShort% portal (hereinafter: Portal) is %owner% — a streamer active on Twitch, Kick and Discord. GDPR contact: via the Discord server discord.gg/deAPJ9Ym2F — a direct message to the admin.
privacy.s2intro1: When you sign in via OAuth (Twitch / Discord), the Portal receives:
privacy.s2b1: Your email address (from your Twitch or Discord account)
privacy.s2b4: Your platform ID (Twitch User ID, Discord User ID — unique identifiers)
privacy.s2b5: OAuth access token and refresh token (to keep the session and refresh data)
privacy.s2b6: Your channel subscription status (if available via the API)
privacy.s2intro2: While you use the Portal we also collect:
privacy.s2c1: The number of Discord messages and time spent in voice — sent by the Discord bot
privacy.s2c3: Achievements earned, quests completed, items bought in the shop
privacy.s2c4: Request IP for administrative actions (audit log, for security purposes)
privacy.s2c5: Donation data (donor name, amount, optional message) received via Streamlabs / YouTube / PayMedia webhooks
privacy.s2c6: Shipping & contact details (full name, address, phone, email, parcel locker) — only if you choose to save them to claim a physical reward; stored encrypted and with your explicit consent
privacy.s2c7: Web-push subscription (if you enable notifications) and passkey credentials (if you register one), to deliver notifications / passwordless sign-in
privacy.s3b1: Authorization: sign-in and session maintenance (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR — performance of a contract)
privacy.s3b2: %tokenName% economy: awarding rewards, fulfilling purchases, maintaining the ranking
privacy.s3b3: Subscriber identification: granting extra features to Twitch/Kick subs
privacy.s3b4: Security: admin action audit log, rate limiting, abuse detection (Art. 6(1)(f) — legitimate interest)
privacy.s4b1: Vercel Inc. (USA) — Portal hosting. Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC)
privacy.s4b2: Supabase Inc. (Frankfurt, EU) — database. Hosted in eu-central-1
privacy.s4b3: Twitch Interactive Inc. and Discord Inc. — OAuth providers, for authentication
privacy.s4b5: Streamlabs, PayMedia, YouTube, Steam — donation / super-chat processing and game-stat lookups
privacy.s4b6: Stripe Inc. (USA) — payment processing for portal subscriptions (Standard Contractual Clauses), where enabled
privacy.s4b7: Emote CDNs (7TV / BTTV / FFZ) — rendering chat emotes (images only, no personal data)
privacy.s4b4: We do not sell or share data with marketers
privacy.s5b2: OAuth tokens: rotated automatically, old ones deleted
privacy.s5b4: Admin action audit log: indefinitely (for security and forensics)
privacy.s5b6: Shipping details: kept until the reward is fulfilled, then deleted — and you can delete them yourself anytime in your profile
privacy.s6b1: Right of access — you can request a copy of your data
privacy.s6b2: Right to rectification — we correct inaccurate data
privacy.s6b3: Right to erasure (right to be forgotten) — we delete the account and all related data
privacy.s6b5: Right to data portability — export in JSON format
privacy.s6b6: Right to lodge a complaint with the President of the UODO (https://uodo.gov.pl)
privacy.s6p: To exercise any right — message the admin of the <discord>%brandShort%</discord> Discord server. We'll respond within 30 days.
privacy.s7b3: Content Security Policy, X-Frame-Options, Permissions-Policy headers
privacy.s7b5: Atomic database transactions for economy operations
privacy.s7b6: Audit log with IP for all administrative actions
privacy.s7b7: OAuth passwords are NOT stored — we only use tokens
privacy.s7b8: Sensitive data (OAuth tokens, shipping details) is encrypted at rest (AES-256-GCM)
privacy.s8p: The Portal uses only technical cookies (the NextAuth session) — essential for it to function. We do not use tracking / marketing / analytics cookies.
privacy.s9p: We publish changes on this page. Major changes are announced on Discord. Using the Portal after changes take effect means accepting them.

achievements.help: Achievements unlock automatically for activity (chat, games, quests…). Each one grants XP. The card shows how to earn it.
achievements.metaDesc: Every %brandShort% achievement — common, rare, epic and legendary.
achievements.title: ACHIEVEMENTS
achievements.galleryNote: Full gallery of {count} achievements. Sign in to track your progress.
achievements.emptyMsg: No achievement matches the selected filters.
achievements.hiddenDesc: Hidden achievement — revealed once you earn it.

ranking.help: The community leaderboard — sort by %tokenName%, XP and more. You climb through activity: chat, watching, quests and games.
ranking.metaDesc: The top %brandShort% members — leading tokens, level and streak.
ranking.subtitle: The top members of %brandShort%. Re-sort by metric.
ranking.emptyMsg: Nobody has points in the {category} category yet. Be the first!
ranking.admRolesNote: Click = toggle. The real state in the DB may differ from the UI here — refresh after changes.

events.help: Events are community happenings: tournaments and raffles. Join, earn tickets through activity and take part in prize draws.
events.metaDesc: Giveaways, raffles, happy hours and contests in %brandShort%.
events.title: EVENTS
events.subtitle: Current giveaways, raffles, happy hours and contests. Take part, win prizes.
events.emptyMsg: Nothing's happening right now — check back later or watch for announcements on stream.
events.boughtTickets: Bought {count, plural, one {# ticket} other {# tickets}} (#{first}-{last})
events.winnersDrawn: Drawn {count, plural, one {a winner} other {# winners}}

userProfile.xpTotalMax: {xp} XP total · max LVL — XP builds prestige ✦
userProfile.xpTotal: {xp} XP total / {max} XP to max LVL
userProfile.clanWarWins: {count, plural, one {# war won} other {# wars won}}
userProfile.clanWarWinsTitle: Clan wars won by this clan
userProfile.socialEmptyOther: This user hasn't added social links.

about.metaDesc: What %brandShort% is, how to earn %tokenName% and how to start.
about.heroSub1: The official community portal of streamer %owner%.
about.heroSub2: Collect %tokenName% for activity, redeem them for rewards, climb the ranking, win events.
about.launchPortalSub: Your own white-label community portal — free 14-day trial, no card.
about.whatP1: %brandShort% is a community portal connecting Twitch, Kick, YouTube and Discord into one economy based on %tokenName% (%gt%).
about.whatP2: Tokens come in for every activity: chatting, voice, watching streams, entering drop codes, completing daily quests. Subs earn more. Streakers earn even more.
about.whatP3: What can you do with tokens? Redeem them for real rewards — Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted Twitch subs, a custom Discord nickname color, 1-on-1 voice with Ghost, tickets to an offline meetup.
about.welcomeBonusNote: For your first sign-in. No strings attached.
about.featShopDesc: Steam keys, CS2 skins, gifted subs, voice with Ghost. Every reward for %tokenName%.
about.featRankDesc: 4 rankings: balance, lifetime earnings, level, streak. Top 100 + your position.
about.featEventsDesc: Giveaways, raffles, happy hours with x2 multipliers. Win real prizes.
about.featPredDesc: Bet on the stream outcome with %tokenName%. Winners split the whole pot proportionally to their stakes.
about.featPassDesc: Monthly seasons, 30 tiers. Earn XP for every activity and claim rewards from each level.
about.featAchDesc: 60 achievements: common, rare, epic, legendary. For level, prestige, streak, duels, casino, subs, donations.
about.featQuestDesc: 3 tasks every day: chat, voice, drop. Bonus reward for completing all at once.
about.featStreakDesc: Each active day = +1 to your streak. The longer it is, the bigger the daily bonus.
about.step1Desc: Via Twitch, Kick, Discord or Google/YouTube — your choice on the sign-in page. First sign-in = 500 %gt% welcome bonus.
about.step2Desc: Go to /profile and link the rest of your accounts to one profile. Subbed on Twitch and Kick at once = Dual Supporter.
about.step3Desc: Chat on Discord, hang out in voice, enter drop codes during live. Tokens roll in the background.
about.step4Desc: Go to /shop. Something for everyone — from 8,000 %gt% (nickname color) to 1,500,000 %gt% (a legendary skin).
about.earn1Desc: An active chat = tokens. A daily limit protects against spam.
about.earn2Desc: Spend time in voice channels with others. Tokens come in every minute.
about.earn3Desc: Ghost drops secret codes on stream. Be first to type it = bonus reward.
about.earn4Desc: Twitch/Kick subs, gifted subs and bits are detected automatically and rewarded with %gt%.
about.earn5Desc: A donation via Streamlabs or YouTube Super Chat = tokens + patron badges.
about.earn6Desc: A well-placed bet on /predictions = a share of the losers' pot for you.
about.earn7Desc: During an active Happy Hour all tokens come in double.
about.earn8Desc: 3 tasks a day. Finish them all = bonus pool.
about.socialsText: All the official %brandShort% channels. Discord is the community hub — events, drop codes, support.
about.changelogIntro: Click an entry to expand details.
